title: Floating Islands
body:
First place glowstone near a villager it will become a Floating Island Trader buy a floating island portal Igniter.

Build a glowstone portal use the floating island portal Igniter on it to light portal go though to get to Floating Islands.

The floating islands are spruce forests and have end void gaps too.


This mod can be cool for end game bases and for killing mobs because they always spawn there.





  <font size="-5">This is mod was made with MCreator</font>
